title: Welcome to MCI Mail Service
body: Hi:  Welcome to MCI Communications' latest and greatest offering: 'MCI Mail Services'  We hope you'll look to us as fondly as you do your neighborhood postman!  Let us step into the future of communication together.  Best,  Vint Cerf  CEO of MCI Communications Corp.

title: Contrato n22
body: Sector: X11.  Objective: Investigate the sewers and report only to me.  Reward: 22 MCr.

title: wtf are you kidding me?
body: Are you kidding me? Why don't you change your password?  The system is entirely compromised until you correct it.  You're the sysadmin, if you're this dumb the corporation is at risk.
